kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either Wulfric goes with Southgate, or Weaver goes with 3 coins — but not both.
If Cedric does not belong to the Ironmongers' Guild, then Fletcher goes with Millpond.
At most one of Beatrix and Edmund belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
More members of the North Side are in the Joiners' Guild than members of the South Side.
Between Kingsford and Oldwall, one goes with Tanner and the other with 2 coins.

Everyone in the River Ward ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Gate Ward.
Edmund goes with at least two of Weaver, Oldwall, and 3 coins.
Either 6 coins goes with Bridgegate or someone in the River Ward goes with Matilda.
At least one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the Hill Ward.
Cedric goes with 7 coins if and only if 3 coins goes with Cooper.
Beatrix, Cedric, and Edmund go with Bridgegate, 2 coins, and 6 coins, in some order.
Bridgegate goes with at most one of Cedric, Mason, and 5 coins.
At most two of (the members of the South Side, Edmund, and Cedric) belong to the Joiners' Guild.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
